case_title: CLEM LLC VS. KALASWESHA MCCOY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 73897699) AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOY, KALASWESHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
